name: Resource Guru Scheduling API
what_it_does: Simple resource planning and team scheduling platform with REST API — managing people, equipment, and meeting room bookings with visual capacity view for agencies, consultancies, and creative teams, offering straightforward API for CRM and PM integration.
use_cases: Querying team capacity and availability for project planning automation
Creating resource bookings from project management systems via API
Syncing Resource Guru scheduling data with CRM for project-based billing
Monitoring team utilization across projects via reporting API
Managing leave and time-off requests alongside project allocations
not_for: Hourly shift scheduling for frontline workers (use Deputy or When I Work)
Financial forecasting and revenue modeling (use Runn)
Enterprise ERP resource management with complex rules
best_when: An agency, consultancy, or creative team needs simple visual resource scheduling with API integration for CRM/PM sync without financial forecasting complexity.
avoid_when: You need financial forecasting, complex project budget tracking, or shift-based scheduling for hourly workers.

auth.notes: OAuth2 Authorization Code for third-party apps. API key for direct account access. Account subdomain in API URLs. No fine-grained OAuth2 scopes — full account access. Token expiry with refresh.

pricing.paid_tiers: Grasshopper from $4.16/person/month; Blackbelt from $6.65/person/month; Master from $10/person/month
pricing.notes: No free tier. Affordable per-person pricing. UK-based (London). API on all paid plans. Bootstrapped, profitable company. 10,000+ customers. Simple, reliable scheduling tool. Meeting room and equipment booking alongside people scheduling. Good uptime record.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clean REST API for resources (people, equipment, rooms), projects, clients, and bookings. OAuth2 for integrations. No webhooks — must poll. Good documentation for bootstrapped product. Account subdomain in URLs. Simple entity model makes integration straightforward.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Booking creation creates new bookings — not idempotent. Resource management idempotent by ID. Read operations always idempotent. No native duplicate detection.
known_agent_gotchas: Account subdomain required in all API URLs
No webhooks — must poll for booking changes
Resources include people, equipment, AND rooms — check resource type before booking
No bulk booking creation — must create bookings individually

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. UK/EU company with strong privacy culture. OAuth2 for integrations. EU and US data residency. Bootstrapped company — strong security culture despite smaller team.
